extension.description: Classic ASP language support backed by asp-lsp.
command.openSettings.title: Classic ASP: Open Settings
configuration.title: Classic ASP LSP
configuration.locale.description: Display language for asp-lsp generated diagnostics, code actions, CodeLens, and extension messages. Auto follows the VS Code or LSP client locale.
configuration.defaultLanguage.descriptio: Default server-side script language for Classic ASP pages.
configuration.checkJs.description: Enable semantic checking for client JavaScript regions.
configuration.incremental.mode.descripti: Controls parser incremental update strategy. full enables range rescans with CST node reuse, legacy keeps the conservative fallback path, and off reparses the full document after text changes.
configuration.incremental.analysis.descr: Enable incremental VBScript analysis memoization for reused CST nodes. Disable this to force per-analysis statement snapshots while keeping parser incremental mode unchanged.
configuration.diagnostics.debounceMs.des: Delay, in milliseconds, before publishing diagnostics after text changes. Set to 0 to publish immediately.
configuration.debug.output.description: Controls asp-lsp debug timing logs in the VS Code Output channel. Off disables logs, summary logs operation start and completion, and verbose adds per-step timings.
configuration.debug.logFile.enabled.desc: Write asp-lsp debug and trace logs to a rotating log file. Disabled by default.
configuration.debug.logFile.path.descrip: Path for the asp-lsp debug log file. Leave empty to use the extension storage default path.
configuration.javascript.unusedDiagnosti: Report unused JavaScript and JScript locals and parameters as hint diagnostics.
configuration.javascript.autoImports.des: Enable TypeScript-powered JavaScript and JScript auto import completions and quick fixes.
configuration.javascript.ignoreProjectCo: Ignore nearest tsconfig.json or jsconfig.json when building embedded JavaScript and JScript language service projects.
configuration.javascript.compilerOptions: Additional TypeScript compiler options applied to embedded JavaScript and JScript language service projects after tsconfig.json or jsconfig.json is read. asp-lsp still forces browser-safe options such as allowJs, noEmit, and checkJs.
configuration.virtualRoot.description: Root directory used to resolve virtual include paths.
configuration.virtualRoots.description: Additional root directories used to resolve virtual include paths.
configuration.windowsPathResolution.desc: Resolve Classic ASP include paths case-insensitively like Windows and report diagnostics when include path casing differs from the file system. Disable to use the host file system behavior only.
configuration.legacyEncoding.description: Encoding used when reading unopened include files. Auto detection is used by default.
configuration.format.indentSize.descript: Indent size used by the Classic ASP formatter. When unset, editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.indentStyle.descrip: Indent style used by the Classic ASP formatter. When unset, editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.printWidth.descript: Preferred line width shared by embedded HTML and CSS formatting. Set 0 or leave unset to use each embedded formatter default instead of requesting wrapping.
configuration.format.endOfLine.descripti: Line ending written by full-document formatting. Auto preserves the document's existing LF or CRLF style based on the current file.
Add a final line break when full-document formatting rewrites the file. This does not remove an existing final line break when disabled.
configuration.format.preserveNewLines.de: Preserve existing blank lines while formatting embedded HTML and CSS. Disable only when you want the formatter to collapse author-inserted spacing.
configuration.format.maxPreserveNewLines: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines preserved by embedded HTML and CSS formatting. Leave unset to use the embedded formatter default.
configuration.format.indentEmptyLines.de: Indent otherwise empty lines in embedded HTML and CSS blocks. This can reduce visual jumps in old pages but may create whitespace-only lines.
configuration.format.enabledLanguages.de: Embedded languages that the formatter may rewrite in Classic ASP files. Remove a language when that part of legacy pages must be left untouched.
configuration.format.embeddedLanguageFor: Controls formatting of embedded CSS and JavaScript/JScript blocks. Off keeps those embedded languages unchanged while still allowing ASP/VBScript formatting.
configuration.format.respectDisableRegio: Honor `asp-format off` / `asp-format on` and `asp-lsp-format off` / `asp-lsp-format on` markers. Protected ranges are restored after formatting so fragile legacy code is not rewritten.
configuration.format.htmlIndentSize.desc: Indent size used for HTML formatting. When unset, aspLsp.format.indentSize or editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.htmlIndentStyle.des: Indent style used for HTML formatting. When unset, aspLsp.format.indentStyle or editor formatting options are used.
Maximum line length requested from the embedded HTML formatter. Leave unset to use aspLsp.format.printWidth, or set 0 to disable HTML wrapping.
How the embedded HTML formatter wraps attributes. Preserve modes keep existing attribute line breaks, while force modes expand attributes more aggressively.
configuration.format.htmlWrapAttributesI: Indent size used when aligning wrapped HTML attributes. Leave unset to use the HTML formatter's normal indentation.
configuration.format.htmlIndentInnerHtml: Indent the contents of top-level html, head, and body elements when formatting a complete HTML document. Classic ASP include fragments usually work better with this disabled.
configuration.format.htmlUnformatted.des: Comma-separated HTML tag names whose start and end tags should not be reformatted. Use this for whitespace-sensitive or generated markup.
configuration.format.htmlContentUnformat: Comma-separated HTML tag names whose inner content should not be reformatted. This is useful for tags that contain preformatted text or server-generated fragments.
configuration.format.htmlExtraLiners.des: Comma-separated HTML tag names that should get an extra blank line before them when formatted by the HTML formatter.
configuration.format.cssIndentSize.descr: Indent size used for embedded CSS formatting. When unset, aspLsp.format.indentSize or editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.cssIndentStyle.desc: Indent style used for embedded CSS formatting. When unset, aspLsp.format.indentStyle or editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.cssWrapLineLength.d: Maximum line length requested from the embedded CSS formatter. Leave unset to use aspLsp.format.printWidth, or set 0 to disable CSS wrapping.
configuration.format.cssNewlineBetweenRu: Insert a blank line between CSS rulesets when formatting style blocks and style attributes.
configuration.format.cssNewlineBetweenSe: Place each selector in a comma-separated CSS selector list on its own line.
configuration.format.cssSpaceAroundSelec: Insert spaces around CSS selector separators such as `>`, `+`, and `~`.
configuration.format.cssBraceStyle.descr: CSS brace style used by embedded CSS formatting. Collapse keeps opening braces on the selector line; expand uses an Allman-style separate brace line.
configuration.format.javascriptIndentSiz: Indent size used for embedded JavaScript formatting. When unset, aspLsp.format.indentSize or editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.javascriptIndentSty: Indent style used for embedded JavaScript formatting. When unset, aspLsp.format.indentStyle or editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.jscriptIndentSize.d: Indent size used for server-side or client-side JScript formatting. When unset, JavaScript indent settings, aspLsp.format.indentSize, or editor options are used.
Indent style used for server-side or client-side JScript formatting. When unset, JavaScript indent style, aspLsp.format.indentStyle, or editor options are used.
configuration.format.javascriptSemicolon: Semicolon preference passed to the TypeScript formatter for embedded JavaScript/JScript. Leave unset to keep the TypeScript formatter default.
configuration.format.javascriptIndentSwi: Controls whether JavaScript/JScript `case` clauses are indented inside `switch` blocks. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
configuration.format.javascriptPlaceOpen: Controls whether JavaScript/JScript function opening braces move to a new line. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls whether JavaScript/JScript control block opening braces move to a new line. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
configuration.format.javascriptInsertSpa: Controls spaces after commas in embedded JavaScript/JScript. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls spaces after semicolons in JavaScript/JScript `for` statements. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls spaces around JavaScript/JScript binary operators. Enabled by default to match existing Classic ASP LSP formatting behavior.
Controls spaces after JavaScript/JScript control-flow keywords such as `if`, `for`, and `while`. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls the space after the `function` keyword in anonymous JavaScript/JScript functions. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls spaces inside non-empty JavaScript/JScript parentheses. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls spaces inside non-empty JavaScript/JScript brackets. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls spaces inside non-empty JavaScript/JScript braces. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls spaces inside empty JavaScript/JScript braces. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Controls the space before JavaScript/JScript function call or declaration parentheses. Leave unset to use the TypeScript formatter default.
Indent size used by VBScript formatting. When unset, aspLsp.format.indentSize or editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.vbscriptIndentStyle: Indent style used by VBScript formatting. When unset, aspLsp.format.indentStyle or editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.vbscriptKeywordCase: Keyword casing used by VBScript formatting. Leave unset to keep existing casing behavior, including the legacy aspLsp.format.uppercaseKeywords setting.
configuration.format.vbscriptLineContinu: Additional indentation used for VBScript lines continued with `_`. Leave unset to indent continued lines by one VBScript indent unit.
configuration.format.vbscriptSelectCaseI: Controls whether VBScript `Case` lines are indented inside `Select Case` or aligned with the `Select Case` line.
configuration.format.uppercaseKeywords.d: Format VBScript keywords using uppercase spelling.
configuration.format.vbscriptBlockIndent: Controls whether multiline <% ... %> VBScript statements align with the delimiters or are indented one level inside them.
configuration.format.vbscriptTagIndentMo: Controls how embedded VBScript regions relate to surrounding HTML indentation. Leave unset to keep legacy ignoreVbscriptTagIndent behavior.
configuration.format.cssTagIndentMode.de: Controls how embedded CSS blocks relate to surrounding HTML indentation. Leave unset to keep legacy ignoreCssTagIndent behavior.
configuration.format.javascriptTagIndent: Controls how embedded JavaScript and JScript blocks relate to surrounding HTML indentation. Leave unset to keep legacy ignoreJavaScriptTagIndent behavior.
configuration.format.aspDelimiterSpacing: Spacing inside ASP delimiters for one-line blocks, expressions, and directives. Padded writes `<% code %>` and compact writes `<%code%>`.
configuration.format.aspBlockNewline.des: Controls whether one-line ASP blocks may stay on one line or multiline ASP blocks should always be expanded. Preserve keeps the current conservative behavior.
configuration.format.nestedAspInCssJs.de: Controls embedded CSS/JavaScript regions that contain nested ASP tags. The default skips those regions; protectAspOnly restores ASP placeholders after formatting; formatAroundAsp lets the delegate formatter see the original mixed content.
configuration.format.fragmentMode.descri: Controls how top-level Classic ASP markup is handed to the embedded HTML formatter. Auto keeps the normal HTML service behavior, fragment formats the file under a temporary wrapper and removes that wrapper afterward, and document formats the whole file directly.
configuration.format.ignoreVbscriptTagIn: Ignore parent tag indentation when formatting embedded VBScript regions.
Ignore parent tag indentation when formatting embedded CSS style elements.
configuration.format.ignoreJavaScriptTag: Ignore parent tag indentation when formatting embedded JavaScript and JScript regions.
configuration.format.onSave.description: Return full-document formatting edits from textDocument/willSaveWaitUntil. Disabled by default.
configuration.vbscript.typeChecking.desc: Controls VBScript type diagnostics. Strict enables type mismatch, member, and call checks.
configuration.vbscript.identifierCase.de: Reports VBScript declaration names that do not match the selected identifier casing. Use ignore to disable naming hints.
configuration.vbscript.identifierCaseByK: Overrides VBScript identifier casing per declaration kind.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.descript: Custom COM type catalog keyed by Prog.ID for Server.CreateObject type checking and completion.
Members exposed by this COM object.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.memberSt: Property type shorthand, for example String, ADODB.Recordset, or String | Number.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.type.des: Property or return type. Use | for union types.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.returnTy: Method return type. Overrides type when present. Use | for union types.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.paramete: Parameter type shorthand. Use | for union types.
configuration.vbscript.globals.descripti: Runtime or framework-provided VBScript globals keyed by identifier.
configuration.vbscript.globals.string.de: Global object type shorthand, for example MyCompany.Repository or String | Nothing.
configuration.vbscript.globals.type.desc: Global object type. Use | for union types.
configuration.vbscript.unusedDiagnostics: Report unused VBScript declarations as hint diagnostics.
configuration.vbscript.deadCodeDiagnosti: Report unreachable VBScript code as hint diagnostics.
configuration.vbscript.syntaxSnippets.de: Enable VBScript syntax snippet completions for common control flow and declaration blocks.
configuration.vbscript.syntaxKeywords.de: Enable context-aware VBScript syntax keyword completions.
configuration.vbscript.showUnresolvedSym: Include implicit global variables and unresolved Function/Sub call targets in VBScript completion lists. Disabled by default.
configuration.vbscript.initializedDimQui: Controls the quick fix style for initialized VBScript Dim declarations. newline rewrites to two statements on separate lines, and sameLineColon rewrites to Dim a : a = value.
configuration.vbscript.ifSyntaxDiagnosti: Controls how strictly VBScript If and ElseIf syntax is checked.
configuration.inlayHints.variableTypes.d: Show inferred VBScript variable type inlay hints.
Show VBScript procedure parameter name inlay hints.
configuration.inlayHints.functionReturnT: Show inferred VBScript function return type inlay hints.
configuration.inlayHints.implicitByRef.d: Show ByRef inlay hints for VBScript parameters whose passing mode is omitted.
configuration.inlayHints.scopeMarkers.gl: Show (global) before global VBScript variable type inlay hints.
configuration.inlayHints.scopeMarkers.lo: Show (local) before local VBScript variable type inlay hints.
configuration.inlayHints.scopeMarkers.un: Show (?) before type inlay hints for implicit global variables whose include/global context is uncertain.
configuration.codeLens.references.descri: Show VBScript reference count CodeLens entries.
configuration.codeLens.referenceProcedur: Show VBScript procedure reference count CodeLens entries for functions, subs, methods, and properties.
Show VBScript top-level variable and constant reference count CodeLens entries.
Show VBScript class reference count CodeLens entries.
configuration.codeLens.referenceClassMem: Show VBScript class field and class constant reference count CodeLens entries.
configuration.codeLens.referenceScope.de: Controls whether VBScript reference count CodeLens uses the whole workspace or only currently analyzed files.
configuration.codeLens.includeRelatedInc: When reference count CodeLens is in workspace mode and the target include tree contains implicit global variables or unresolved references, also count usages from include parents, siblings, and ancestor descendant include trees. Enabled by default.
configuration.codeLens.includes.descript: Show Classic ASP include CodeLens entries.
configuration.rename.updateIncludesOnFil: Update Classic ASP include directives during file rename operations. Disabled by default; when disabled, file renames do not rewrite other files.
configuration.rename.workspaceSymbolRena: Allow symbol and selector rename operations to edit other Classic ASP workspace files. Disabled by default; same-file rename edits stay enabled.
configuration.styleExtraction.insertionM: Controls where inline style extraction code actions insert CSS rules. nearby creates a style element before the target tag, and reuseExistingStyleTag appends to the nearest existing style element when one exists.
configuration.flowchart.maxTextSize.desc: Maximum Mermaid text size accepted when rendering Classic ASP flowcharts.
configuration.flowchart.maxEdges.descrip: Maximum Mermaid edge count accepted when rendering Classic ASP flowcharts.
Preferred Classic ASP flowchart node label line length before wrapping.
configuration.flowchart.labelMode.descri: Default Classic ASP flowchart label mode. Normal keeps the current labels, raw shows source-like statements, and description writes labels as prose.
configuration.flowchart.minZoom.descript: Minimum zoom factor available in Classic ASP flowchart webviews.
configuration.flowchart.maxZoom.descript: Maximum zoom factor available in Classic ASP flowchart webviews.
configuration.flowchart.infoPanelPositio: Controls whether the flowchart information pane appears on the left or right side.
Show the Classic ASP source code panel in flowchart webviews.
configuration.webview.theme.description: Controls graph and flowchart webview colors. Auto follows the current VS Code color theme.
configuration.graph.showRootNodes.descri: Show root file nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showFileNodes.descri: Show non-root file nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showFunctionNodes.de: Show function nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showSubNodes.descrip: Show subroutine nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showClassNodes.descr: Show class nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMethodNodes.desc: Show class method nodes with unknown procedure kind in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMethodFunctionNo: Show class function method nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMethodSubNodes.d: Show class sub method nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showPropertyNodes.de: Show class property nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMemberNodes.desc: Show built-in, configured, and unresolved object member nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showGlobalVariableNo: Show global VBScript variable and object nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showGlobalConstantNo: Show global VBScript constant nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showLocalVariableNod: Show procedure-local VBScript variable and class field nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showLocalConstantNod: Show procedure-local and class constant nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showParameterNodes.d: Show function, sub, method, and property parameter nodes in graph views.
Show unresolved reference nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.hideSingleNodes.desc: Hide non-root nodes that have no visible links in graph views.
configuration.graph.hideUnreferencedGlob: Hide source functions, subs, classes, global variables, and global constants that have no references from other files in graph views.
configuration.graph.showOutgoingSelectio: Also highlight links that start from the selected node in graph views.
configuration.graph.showIncludeLinks.des: Show include links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showDeclareLinks.des: Show declaration-to-source links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showReferenceLinks.d: Show reference links in graph views.
Show assignment links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showCallLinks.descri: Show call links in graph views.
Show unresolved reference links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMemberLinks.desc: Show object member reference and call links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showIncomingDocument: Include files that directly include the current file in current-file graph views.
configuration.graph.showIncomingFolderIn: Include files that directly include files under the selected folder in folder graph views.
configuration.graph.useReverseIncludeInd: Use the workspace reverse-include index when finding files that include the current file or selected folder. Disable to fall back to the older full workspace scan.
configuration.graph.includeRelatedInclud: When current-file graph analysis finds implicit global variables or unresolved references, also analyze include parents, siblings, and descendant include trees to improve cross-file assignment and definition matching. Enabled by default.
configuration.graph.maxDocuments.descrip: Maximum number of documents included in one rendered graph payload. Applies to current-file, folder, and workspace graph views.
configuration.graph.maxTextLength.descri: Maximum total text size, in bytes, included in one rendered graph payload. Applies to current-file, folder, and workspace graph views.
configuration.graph.maxNodes.description: Maximum number of graph nodes sent to the webview. When a graph is larger, asp-lsp keeps the highest-degree and highest-priority nodes and reports truncation metadata.
configuration.graph.includeTreeMaxDocume: Maximum number of documents included while building one current-file graph include tree.
configuration.graph.includeTreeMaxTextLe: Maximum total text size, in bytes, included while building one current-file graph include tree.
configuration.graph.workerSymbolExtracti: Extract VBScript graph symbol indexes in the worker pool. Disabled by default because small files can be slower from clone and queue overhead.
configuration.graph.initialViewMode.desc: Controls whether graph views open in 2D or 3D by default.
configuration.graph.infoPanelPosition.de: Controls whether the graph inspector pane appears on the left or right side.
configuration.graph.openLocation.descrip: Controls where graph views open: active editor group or beside the current editor.
configuration.excel.includeRelatedInclud: When Excel export runs, also analyze include parents, siblings, and descendant include trees to improve cross-file assignment and definition tables. Enabled by default.
configuration.excel.skipTypeInference.de: Skip editor-inferred VBScript type details during Excel export to make large workbooks faster. Disabled by default.
configuration.excel.maxDocuments.descrip: Maximum number of documents included in one Excel analysis workbook. This output limit is separate from the include tree traversal limit.
configuration.excel.maxTextLength.descri: Maximum total text size, in bytes, included in one Excel analysis workbook. This output limit is separate from the include tree traversal limit.
configuration.excel.includeTreeMaxDocume: Maximum number of documents included while exporting one Excel include tree. The default is higher than graph views because Excel export is an explicit analysis task.
configuration.excel.includeTreeMaxTextLe: Maximum total text size, in bytes, included while exporting one Excel include tree. The default is higher than graph views because Excel export is an explicit analysis task.
configuration.excel.locale.description: Language used for Excel export labels. auto follows the VS Code display language.
configuration.cache.enabled.description: Persist unopened workspace analysis results on disk.
configuration.cache.directory.descriptio: Directory used for Classic ASP LSP disk analysis cache. Leave empty to use the OS temporary directory.
configuration.cache.freshness.descriptio: Controls how disk cache freshness is checked. auto uses metadata on local profiles and watch on network profiles, metadata verifies file metadata before reuse, and watch trusts file watcher changes to minimize network drive IO.
configuration.cache.ttlHours.description: Hours before disk analysis cache entries expire.
configuration.cache.maxSizeMb.descriptio: Maximum disk analysis cache size in megabytes.
configuration.memory.maxCacheBytes.descr: Maximum estimated in-process cache memory in bytes before asp-lsp evicts lower-priority caches. The default is 512 MiB.
configuration.memory.debugTelemetry.desc: Write memory budget snapshots and eviction details to the asp-lsp debug log file when debug log file output is enabled.
configuration.network.profile.descriptio: Filesystem performance profile. auto enables network-drive defaults for UNC paths and common SMB/NFS mount points; local keeps immediate filesystem checks; network enables TTL caches, higher include-read concurrency, watch freshness defaults, and fast case resolution.
configuration.network.statCacheTtlMs.des: Override stat/exists cache TTL in milliseconds. -1 uses the selected profile default, and 0 disables stat/exists caching.
Override directory-listing cache TTL in milliseconds. -1 uses the selected profile default, and 0 disables directory-listing caching.
configuration.network.includeReadConcurr: Override include traversal and include-reference read concurrency. 0 uses the selected profile default.
configuration.network.caseResolution.des: Controls include path case resolution. auto uses the selected profile default; full checks directory entries for case mismatches; fast tries a direct stat first and may skip case-mismatch detection when the direct path exists.
configuration.workspace.includes.descrip: Workspace-relative glob patterns included in Classic ASP workspace analysis, workspace graphs, and folder graphs.
configuration.workspace.excludes.descrip: Workspace-relative glob patterns excluded from Classic ASP workspace analysis, workspace graphs, and folder graphs.
configuration.workspace.respectGitIgnore: Ignore files matched by a workspace root .gitignore during Classic ASP workspace analysis and graph folder scans.
configuration.workspace.maxIndexFiles.de: Maximum number of unopened Classic ASP workspace files indexed per scan. Raise this for large network-drive workspaces that need 5,000-50,000 ASP/INC files indexed.
configuration.workspace.scanChunkSize.de: Number of filesystem entries processed before yielding during workspace indexing.
configuration.workspace.busyAnalysisConc: Maximum workspace analysis concurrency. Set 0 to use half of the available CPU count.
configuration.workspace.vbProjectMaxDocu: Maximum number of documents included in one full VBScript project context and include cycle traversal. Graph and Excel include trees also have feature-specific limits.
configuration.workspace.vbProjectMaxText: Maximum total text size, in bytes, included in one full VBScript project context and include cycle traversal. Graph and Excel include trees also have feature-specific limits.
command.restartServer.title: Classic ASP: Restart Language Server
command.reindexWorkspace.title: Classic ASP: Reindex Workspace
command.clearCache.title: Classic ASP: Clear All Analysis Caches
command.clearDiskCache.title: Classic ASP: Clear Disk Analysis Cache
command.clearProcessCache.title: Classic ASP: Clear Process Analysis Cache
command.openOutput.title: Classic ASP: Open Output
command.showProgressDetails.title: Classic ASP: Show Progress Details
command.showCurrentFileGraph.title: Classic ASP: Show Current File Graph
command.showFolderGraph.title: Classic ASP: Show Folder Graph
command.showWorkspaceGraph.title: Classic ASP: Show Workspace Graph
command.showWorkspaceGlobFiles.title: Classic ASP: Show Project Glob Files
command.exportCurrentFileAnalysisExcel.t: Classic ASP: Export Current File Analysis to Excel
command.showCurrentFileFlowchart.title: Classic ASP: Show Current File Flowchart
command.exportCurrentFileFlowchart.title: Classic ASP: Export Current File Flowchart as Mermaid
taskDefinition.task.description: Classic ASP LSP workspace task name.
capability.untrustedWorkspaces.descripti: Classic ASP LSP runs local analysis and does not require workspace trust for language features.
